---
name: Skill request
about: Propose a new enterprise skill or skill improvement
title: "[Skill request] "
labels: skill-request
assignees: ""
---

## Workflow

What recurring enterprise workflow should this skill improve?

## Audience

Who uses the output?

## Input Artifacts

Examples: meeting notes, CI logs, CRM CSVs, policy text, support threads, research sources.

## Output Standard

What should a good output contain?

## Quality Risks

What must the skill avoid inventing, oversimplifying, or mishandling?

## Evidence

Provide a realistic prompt, sanitized fixture, or example workflow.
